name: Hume AI
description: Empathic voice AI lab providing speech-to-speech models (EVI, Octave) that understand and generate emotion.

seo.title: Hume AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Hume AI: Empathic voice AI lab providing speech-to-speech models (EVI, Octave) that understand and generate emotion.

when_to_use: Measuring emotional tone in voice and video for UX research
Building empathic voice interfaces with emotion-aware responses
Analyzing customer sentiment from call recordings at scale
Detecting emotional signals in text for mental health apps

pros: Octave TTS is expressive and customizable
cons: Pricing higher than commodity TTS providers
Emotion labels raise ethical and UX questions
Still niche vs incumbents like ElevenLabs
review.verdict: The lab to use when empathy and affect in voice actually matter to your product.
review.best_for: Voice agents, coaching, healthcare and companionship apps
review.not_for: Bulk TTS workloads where cost per character is the priority

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
